hooks.command: claude_hook_input=''; while IFS= read -r claude_hook_line || [ -n "$claude_hook_line" ]; do claude_hook_input="${claude_hook_input}${claude_hook_line}"; done; for claude_python_launcher in python3 "py -3" python; do printf '%s' "$claude_hook_input" | $claude_python_launcher "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/protect_sensitive_files.py"; claude_hook_status=$?; if [ "$claude_hook_status" -eq 0 ] || [ "$claude_hook_status" -eq 2 ]; then exit "$claude_hook_status"; fi; done; exit 2
